headline: Q1 Brings Some Improvements To Regions Financial
summary: Regions Financial Corporation is rated a Hold, reported Q1 2026 adjusted EPS of $0.62, with total revenue at $1.87 billion. Read more on RF stock here.

headline: Fifth Third Stock Down as Q1 Earnings Miss, Expenses Rise Y/Y
summary: FITB stock lost nearly 1.3% after Q1 earnings miss as rising expenses and higher credit provisions offset strong NII and fee income growth.

raw.headline: Fifth Third Stock Down as Q1 Earnings Miss, Expenses Rise Y/Y

headline: Truist Q1 Earnings Beat on Higher NII and Non-Interest Income
summary: TFC beats Q1 earnings estimates as NII and fee income rise, but higher expenses and credit provisions weigh on the quarter.

raw.headline: Truist Q1 Earnings Beat on Higher NII and Non-Interest Income
raw.summary: TFC beats Q1 earnings estimates as NII and fee income rise, but higher expenses and credit provisions weigh on the quarter.

headline: KBW's Chris McGratty shares his take on multiple bank stocks
summary: Chris McGratty, KBW head of U.S. bank research, joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss his take on earnings from the banking sector, how he would position banks in a portfolio, his outlook for select bank stocks, and more.

headline: Retaining Deposit Market Share Is Challenging In Big Bank Deals
summary: Large bank buyers returned to M&A market, but a review of some previous big-ticket deals shows how difficult it is to maintain the pro forma deposit market share totals. Read more here.
